name: HC-05 Bluetooth Module (ZS-040)
description: HC-05 bluetooth serial (SPP) module on the common ZS-040 carrier board, 3.6-6V supply / 3.3V logic, 6-pin right-angle header. HC-06 ships on the same board (4 of 6 pins used).
dimensions_source: ZS-040 carrier: 37x16 board (ProtoSupplies measured), 6-pin 2.54 right-angle header inset 2.0 from edge, group centered; daughterboard 27x13. Pin names verbatim from board silkscreen.
